full_text: March 15, 2026 View in a web browser Share Good morning! Welcome to Metro's daily football newsletter. Read on for the day's biggest and best stories, latest news, gossip and more about the team you love. Want even more in-depth analysis? In The Mixer is your weekly guide to the chaotic world of football. From the latest transfer rumours and managerial moves to analysis of the biggest games and a lot more, our experts have you covered. The way you get your news is changing. As a loyal Metro reader, we want to make sure you never miss our must-read stories. Click the button below to see news from us first in Google Search. Want to receive bespoke updates about a different club? Click here and confirm which team you want to hear about. Thanks for reading! If you're reading this email online or it was forwarded to you, you can sign up to receive the Football Newsletter every morning. Share with a mate! Forward this email to a friend using the link in your email provider. If you'd like to ...
